title: [Apache Flink 1.13.3 Released](</2021/10/19/apache-flink-1.13.3-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.13.3 Released
October 19, 2021 - Chesnay Schepler
The Apache Flink community released the third bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.13 series.
This release includes 136 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.13.2. The l…
